items: Designed Nuxt.js frontend architecture (composables, shared UI patterns, API abstractions) for a 6-month page-by-page migration from a legacy Vue codebase
Built Laravel backend features delivered on deadline and approved without change requests

Migrated Telegram bot from JavaScript to TypeScript with Playwright coverage — production bug reports dropped from 2–3 per week to about 1 every 2 weeks, mostly JS type-error crashes the migration eliminated
Built 15+ Svelte/SvelteKit components for a full system revamp — including the data-mesh/table component used across the new product's admin views
Built and maintained 6 shipping and marketplace integrations (J&T, NinjaVan, ParcelHub, Shopee, Lazada, Zalora) powering daily order operations for 20+ B2B SaaS clients
Built a real-time Facebook Live sales dashboard — webhooks for order events, WebSockets pushing live revenue and order counts during broadcasts
